name: Janet Napolitano
role: DHS Secretary (2009–2013) — Obama Administration
quote: We will continue to enforce the law, including against those who have been convicted of crimes. But we will do so in a way that is consistent with our values.

name: Kirstjen Nielsen
role: DHS Secretary (Dec 2017–Apr 2019) — Implemented Zero Tolerance
quote: We will not apologize for doing our jobs. We have sworn to defend this country and we will do so.

name: Alejandro Mayorkas
role: DHS Secretary (2021–2025) — Biden Administration
quote: We will focus our enforcement resources on those who pose a threat to national security, border security, and public safety.

name: Kristi Noem
role: DHS Secretary (Jan 2025–Mar 2026) — Removed after Metro Surge shooting deaths
quote: We are going to enforce the law. Every single person who is here illegally is a priority for removal.

name: Markwayne Mullin
role: DHS Secretary (Apr 2026–Present) — Trump Second Term; former U.S. Senator (R-OK)
quote: We are going to continue the enforcement mission, but we are going to do it in a way that doesn't create unnecessary controversy.

name: Thomas Homan
role: Acting ICE Director (2017–2018); Trump 'Border Czar' (2025–Present)
quote: No one is off the table. If you're in this country illegally, you should be uncomfortable.

name: John Morton
role: ICE Director (2009–2013) — Prosecutorial Discretion Memos
quote: ICE cannot and should not expend limited enforcement resources on the apprehension and removal of aliens who qualify for deferred action.

name: Stephen Miller
role: Senior White House Adviser — Architect of Family Separation & Mass Deportation
quote: Our immigration system has been totally broken for decades. The only solution is real enforcement — not promises, real enforcement.

name: Jeff Sessions
role: U.S. Attorney General (2017–2018) — Zero Tolerance Policy
quote: If you are smuggling a child, then we will prosecute you, and that child will be separated from you as required by law.

name: Lee Gelernt
role: ACLU Deputy Director, Immigrants' Rights Project — Ms. L v. ICE Lead Counsel
quote: What the government did to these families — separating parents from babies and toddlers — is one of the most cruel and shameful episodes in the modern history of this country.

name: Marielena Hincapié
role: Executive Director, National Immigration Law Center
quote: Immigration enforcement that tears families apart, that targets communities of color, and that ignores due process is an affront to our values as a nation.

name: Cecillia Wang
role: ACLU Deputy Legal Director — Immigration and Due Process
quote: ICE operates with impunity. Without real oversight, real accountability, and real consequences, the abuses will continue.

name: Judge Dana Sabraw
role: U.S. District Judge, S.D. Cal. — Ms. L v. ICE
quote: The government readily keeps track of personal property of detainees in criminal and immigration proceedings... Yet, the government has lost track of and failed to reunify thousands of children and their parents.

name: Judge Dolly Gee
role: U.S. District Judge, C.D. Cal. — Flores Settlement Monitor
quote: The government has wholly failed to comply with the Flores settlement's standards for the licensed and non-secure placement of minors.

name: Judge Andrew Hanen
role: U.S. District Judge, S.D. Tex. — Blocked DAPA and Biden Enforcement Priorities
quote: The DAPA memorandum issued by the Secretary of Homeland Security was not a legitimate exercise of prosecutorial discretion.

name: Sarah Saldaña
role: ICE Director (2015–2017) — Final Obama-Era Director
quote: We enforce the immigration laws of the United States, but we do so while respecting the dignity of those we encounter.

name: Omar Jadwat
role: ACLU Immigrants' Rights Project Director
quote: The Trump administration has weaponized the immigration system to terrorize communities across America. The constitutional violations are extensive and ongoing.

name: Andrea Saenz / Immigrant Justice Corps
role: Immigrant Legal Services Provider — Detainee Representation
quote: People in ICE detention face life-altering legal proceedings with no right to appointed counsel. Without lawyers, the system is stacked impossibly against them.

name: Todd Lyons
role: Sr. Official Performing Duties of ICE Director (2025–Present)
quote: This administration has made clear that enforcement is the priority. ICE is executing its mission at an unprecedented pace to protect the American people.

name: Wendy Young
role: President, Kids in Need of Defense (KIND) — Child Detention Advocate
quote: Every child deserves representation in immigration court. What we are doing to children in detention — separating them from parents, housing them in jail-like conditions — is a stain on this country.

name: Dr. Colleen Kraft
role: Former American Academy of Pediatrics President — Child Detention Expert
quote: Detention of children is never in their best interests. Separation of children from their parents is a form of toxic stress that causes irreversible harm to their developing brains.
